title: Proof Event Envelope v1
description: One line of artifacts/events.jsonl. Hash-chained: digest = sha256(canonical json of {seq, unix_time_ms, prev, payload}); prev = previous envelope digest (all-zero for genesis). The event log is append-only; any status stored elsewhere is a cache of these events.

payload.description: Variant fields follow crates/protocol/src/lib.rs. proof_verified may be emitted ONLY by the Rust verifier after kernel acceptance + axiom audit.
